_comment: Shipped default agent registry. core/hooks/supervisor.py and session-init.py read this (they look for agents/master-registry.json, then .claude/agents/master-registry.json, then .agent/agents/registry.json). To customize per project, copy this file into your project at one of those paths and edit. Each `model` MUST equal the model: frontmatter in agents/<id>.md — the CI drift guard (validate-plugin) enforces it.

agents.description: Reviews diffs for quality, correctness, security, performance.
Audits for OWASP Top 10, secret exposure, auth/authz bugs.
Runs a citizen/user persona panel (UX / copy / content review) — samples grounded Korean personas, dispatches each as a panelist, synthesizes their reactions.
